title: FE Commissioner intervention: Havant and South Downs College 2025
body: "A summary of the Further Education (FE) Commissioner’s findings and recommendations following a review of Havant and South Downs College. The review followed an intervention visit in May 2025.  The letter from The Rt Hon Baroness Jacqui Smith, Minister for Skills to the chair of the college:   sets out the outcome of the intervention assessment confirms the next steps to be taken   We produce these reports in line with our commitment to intervention in further education.  "

taxons.title: Further education intervention notices and reports
